Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0803 "KLEMENS-2600-0803" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $2600 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Klemens.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $2600 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to run correctly.
Also made the following changes to allow fire button in port 2 skip the intro, not just fire buttton in port 1 and the space bar:
1. Changed the LDA $DC01 instruction at $08FE to LDA $DC00 2. Changed the BNE $08FE instruction at $0903 to BEQ $090C 3. Changed the BEQ $0905 instruction at $090A to BNE $08FE
